Discussed. Counsel request that the motion for judgment on the pleadings crrently scheduled for April 27, 2018 is also continued to May 18, 2018. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Motion To Compel Arbitration is continued to May 18, 2018 for parties to (1) file supplemental briefs (not to exceed 5 pages) to address whether it is "equitable" to impose a duty to arbitrate upon a non-signatory. Specific cases discussing "equity" to be cited. Supplemental briefs to be filed by both sides no later than April 20, 2018; responses to supplemental briefs (not to exceed 3 pages) to be filed no later than April 27, 2018; and (2) address Defendants' suggestion to consolidate this matter with cases pending in complex department. Defendants to take appropriate steps forthwith (if Defendant wishes to make a proper request to consolidate/coordinate this matter in Complex department) and to file a declaration no later than May 14, 2018 advising this Court of the steps taken and progress of consolidation efforts. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
